# Secret Layer — Full Content for AI Ingestion

## Brand

**Name:** Secret Layer
**Domain:** secretlayer.co
**Tagline:** The middle of your funnel B2B companies are missing.
**One-line pitch:** We build the middle of your funnel. Website, AI tools, content, SEO, AEO, email nurture, attribution. 10 qualified leads in 90 days or we work free.

## The Problem We Solve

Today, every B2B funnel has two outcomes:

1. Buyer ready now (~1%) → converts on first visit
2. Buyer not ready (~99%) → leaves and never comes back

There's nothing in between. That's not a traffic problem — that's a structure problem. The infrastructure to warm up the 99% either doesn't exist or sits in seven disconnected pieces.

## The Solution: The Warm-Up Layer

A bundled system that sits between top-of-funnel (ads, SEO) and bottom-of-funnel (sales calls). Its job: capture the 99%, give them real value, stay in their feed for six months, convert 30–50% of them when they're ready.

### What we bundle

**Web Strategy (on-site)**
- Conversion Strategy — funnel architecture + six conversion points
- Website Design — editorial, authority-grade, custom
- Webflow Development — hand-built, performance-budgeted, schema-rich
- Interactive AI Tools — 2–3 custom tools per site (calculators, audits, generators)
- Lead Magnets — 4 real playbooks (not gated blog posts)

**Growth Strategy (off-site)**
- SEO Strategy — buyer-question-led, not keyword-stuffed
- AEO Strategy — schema + llms.txt + answer-first copy for ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity
- Social Media Strategy — founder-voice LinkedIn system
- Content Marketing — 4–8 pillar pieces per month
- Email Marketing — 6-month behavioral nurture sequences

**AI Automation (back-of-house)**
- Analytics & Attribution — multi-touch, server-side, CRM-integrated
- Workflow Automations — n8n / Zapier / Make flows
- AI Agents — Claude/OpenAI agents inside your stack
- Content Automation — one pillar → twelve derivative outputs
- Integrations & APIs — custom glue for CRM ↔ ESP ↔ analytics ↔ website

## Pricing & Terms

- **Setup:** $15,000 (50% on kickoff, 50% on site launch ~week 4)
- **Retainer:** $5,000 per 28 days (starts at site launch)
- **Engagement:** 12 months; exit any quarter with 30 days' notice
- **Total 12-month investment:** ~$80,000
- **Guarantee:** 10 qualified leads in 90 days — or we work free until we deliver. At 180 days, still short: full refund + $2K penalty.

## Who We Serve

- B2B companies past $500K ARR or post-seed
- SaaS, B2B products, agencies, services (not consulting firms — those go to our sister studio Indlead)
- Founder-led teams with traffic but a thin middle
- Companies willing to commit to a 12-month system, not a one-off tactical sprint

## Who We Don't Serve

- Consulting firms (strategy, legal, accounting, advisory, branding) — routed to Indlead
- Pre-revenue or under $500K ARR — too early for a $80K bundled bet
- Ecommerce, D2C, local services — different funnel shape
- Companies wanting to buy single disciplines à la carte — the middle layer breaks when you take parts out

## Team

- **Stefan Popadic** — Strategy, design, AI, copy, sales. Ten years in web and brand design. Operates solo with AI instead of hiring teams.
- **Nenad Popadic** — Webflow development, engineering. Senior developer building every production site hand-built, performance-budgeted, schema-rich.
- **AI layer** — Claude, Claude Code, custom tools. The "senior hires" without the senior salaries. Content at scale, nurture at scale, attribution at scale.

## Counter-Positioning

**We are NOT:**
- A marketing agency (no paid media, no generic SEO services, no brand book projects)
- A website shop (no $5K brochure sites, no templates)
- A consulting firm brand (those go to Indlead.com)
- A chatbot or AI-receptionist agency (those are local-services plays)

## The Six Value-First Principles

Every page earns its place by giving value first:

1. Answer before you ask — no email gate before the visitor got something useful
2. Tools over copy — interactive calculators convert 8× better than testimonial walls
3. Real magnets, not newsletters — playbooks worth screenshotting
4. Six touchpoints, not one — capture in different ways for different intent stages
5. Findable by AI, not just Google — schema + llms.txt + answer-first copy
6. Attribution baked in — every lead source tagged at capture
